hero.title: Keep the environment clean and unharmed
hero.description: Join us in protecting our planet by ensuring cleaner surroundings. Together, we can reduce waste, promote recycling, and preserve nature for future generations.

aboutUs.title: About SZW
aboutUs.descriptionWithDefaultColor: SZW is an IMS certified social enterprise that offers holistic waste management solutions to corporates, governments, international organizations, bulk waste generators and consumers.
aboutUs.descriptionWithColor: We have been operational for 10 years with a focus around nature, people and technology. Connect with us to know more.

image.alternativeText: people collect garbage in the garden
people collect garbage in the garden

wasteManagementServices.title: A wide range of waste Management services
wasteManagementServices.description: We provide innovative and sustainable waste management services designed to meet the needs of organizations, institutions, and communities. Our goal is to create a cleaner, greener tomorrow.

rangeOfWasteManagementServices.title: Waste Management Services
rangeOfWasteManagementServices.description: Responsible & sustainable waste management solutions for bulk waste generators like corporate parks, universities, residential complexs & more.

image.alternativeText: recycle concept with woman collecting trash

rangeOfWasteManagementServices.title: E-Waste Management
rangeOfWasteManagementServices.description: Specialized solutions for safe disposal and recycling of electronic waste, ensuring compliance with environmental regulations.

image.alternativeText: recycle concept with woman collecting trash

rangeOfWasteManagementServices.title: EPR
rangeOfWasteManagementServices.description: Helping brands and producers meet their EPR obligations through sustainable collection, recycling, and reporting mechanisms.

image.alternativeText: recycle concept with woman collecting trash

rangeOfWasteManagementServices.title: Consulting
rangeOfWasteManagementServices.description: Expert advisory services to guide organizations in adopting eco-friendly waste management strategies and policies.

image.alternativeText: recycle concept with woman collecting trash

rangeOfWasteManagementServices.title: Training & Development
rangeOfWasteManagementServices.description: Workshops and training programs to raise awareness and build capacity for effective waste management practices.

image.alternativeText: recycle concept with woman collecting trash

industriesWeServe.title: Trusted by the world’s most innovative companies

ourProcess.title: Our Process
ourProcess.description: Our process is designed to minimize waste and maximize recycling. From collection to segregation, treatment, and reuse, we ensure every step contributes to environmental sustainability.

transformingWaste.title: Transforming Waste into Resources
transformingWaste.description: We believe waste is not the end, but the beginning of new possibilities. By recycling and reusing, we convert waste into valuable resources that benefit both businesses and communities.

transformingWastesKills.title: 10+ year expertise
transformingWastesKills.description: Over a decade of experience in delivering innovative and sustainable waste management solutions.

transformingWastesKills.title: Certified
transformingWastesKills.description: Recognized and accredited by industry-leading certification bodies for our high standards of operation.

transformingWastesKills.title: Transparency
transformingWastesKills.description: Clear, reliable processes with complete accountability at every stage of waste management.

transformingWastesKills.title: Compliant with laws
transformingWastesKills.description: Strict adherence to national and international environmental regulations.

transformingWastesKills.title: Professional team
transformingWastesKills.description: A highly skilled and dedicated team committed to sustainable practices

transformingWastesKills.title: Safe Careers
transformingWastesKills.description: Promoting safe working conditions and career growth opportunities in the waste management sector.

haveQuestions.title: Still have Questions?
haveQuestions.description: Couldn’t find what you were looking for? Our team is here to help you with customized waste management solutions and expert advice.

latestBlog.title: Waste management container or bin for my home?
latestBlog.descriptions: Discover the right waste management solutions for your home and community. Learn how to choose between containers, bins, and recycling options to keep your surroundings clean.
